title: Rubrik Ransomware Discovery and File Recovery - Rubrik Polaris
content:
This playbook performs an IOC Scan based on the provided inputs, search the recoverable snapshot and performs recovery on the searched recoverable snapshot. This playbook also creates tickets on ServiceNow using "ServiceNow v2" integration. 
Supported integrations: 
- RubrikPolaris
- ServiceNow v2

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Rubrik pack (RubrikPolaris, partner-supported).

Inputs — ObjectId: Object ID of the incident.; ClusterId: Cluster ID of the incident..

Integrations/scripts used: Print, PrintErrorEntry, Set, http, rubrik-gps-vm-recover-files, rubrik-gps-vm-snapshot-create, rubrik-polaris-vm-object-snapshot-list, servicenow-add-comment, servicenow-create-ticket, servicenow-update-ticket.
